CREATE TABLE test_encode (input_text VARCHAR, lines_per_section INTEGER);
INSERT INTO test_encode (input_text, lines_per_section) VALUES ('Hello World!', 10);

CREATE PROCEDURE TEST_UUENCODE (in txt VARCHAR, in lines_per_section INTEGER) BEGIN DECLARE SECTION VARCHAR; DECLARE sections ANY; result_names (SECTION); sections := uuencode (txt, 5, lines_per_section); FOREACH (VARCHAR sect IN sections) DO result (':' || sect); END;
CREATE TABLE test_results (description VARCHAR, encoded_result VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO test_results (description, encoded_result) SELECT 'Basic Encoding', uuencode('Test Data', 5, 10);
INSERT INTO test_results (description, encoded_result) SELECT 'Long Input Encoding', uuencode(REPEAT('LongTestData', 2500), 5, 60);
INSERT INTO test_results (description, encoded_result) SELECT 'Empty Input Encoding', uuencode('', 5, 10);
INSERT INTO test_results (description, encoded_result) SELECT 'Invalid Lines Per Section', uuencode('Sample Text', 0, -5);
INSERT INTO test_results (description, encoded_result) SELECT 'Large Input Encoding', uuencode(REPEAT('C', 10000000), 5, 120);
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_data AS SELECT * FROM test_results;
SELECT * FROM temp_data WHERE description LIKE 'Encoding%';
